**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Panjin Dingxiang Transportation Co., Ltd. Gas Station is the subject of a comically severe data misclassification. Officially tagged in the registry as 'Complete Automobile Manufacturing', this entity is, unequivocally, just a local gas station. Established in 1992 in the oil-rich city of Panjin (Liaoning), its former name, 'Panjin Xinsheng Transport Brigade Gas Station', perfectly describes its origins as a fuel depot for a local transport fleet. The AI recovered its true business scope from the 'other_email' field, which is simply 'Gasoline, diesel, lubricating oil'. Furthermore, it has no registered capital listed and only 2 insured employees (recovered from the organization_code field). This is a textbook micro-retail operation selling fuel, completely detached from any form of industrial vehicle manufacturing.
